# atlas

**Purpose.** Graph index of this repo. Any agent dropped into this
directory reads this file *first* and follows links to the exact

## For AI coding agents — read these first
- [ATLAS.md](ATLAS.md): repository map — where everything lives, commands, architecture, constraints.
- [SCARS.md](SCARS.md): failure memory — read before fixing a bug; stable §anchors (symptom → root cause → do NOT → do).
- .agents/skill/atlas/SKILL.md: procedural playbook — how to run, test, and do common tasks here.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) / [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): behavioral contract for coding agents.
- [LOOP.md](LOOP.md): autonomous improvement loop — one iteration = pick the top [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md) item by EV → implement → 'atlas check' → commit.
- [AKIGI.md](AKIGI.md): purpose contract — why this repo exists, scope/non-goals, how incoming requests are triaged.
- [FRQ.md](FRQ.md): cross-agent feature-request queue — outside agents: read AKIGI.md first, then file your ask here.
- [BRD.md](BRD.md): bug disclosure intake for outside agents — broken behavior goes here (with evidence + repro).
- [SRD.md](SRD.md): security disclosure — minimal public marker only; full detail via its private channel.
